nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Walter De Sully was born about 1140, in Sully, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mabel De Torrington. He died in 1242, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 103.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter De Sullyは約1140年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンスリーで生まれた。彼はMabel De Torringtonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1242年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト トリントンで103歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter De Sully(은)는 대략 1140년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 설리에서 태어났다. 그는 Mabel De Torrington(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 103세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Walter De Sully родился около 1140 г. в местности сулли, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Mabel De Torrington. Он умер в 1242 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 103 лет.
